MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-01-2022 IN 206, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE AND ALL RELATED DISCOVERY DEADLINES. NOAH LEBOWITZ, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. KURT HENDERSHOTT, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT SF COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 9/12/22 IS VACATED AND THE NEW TRIAL DATE IS 3/29/23 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRE-TRIAL AND DISCOVERY DEADLINES SHALL TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MR. HENDERSHOTT TO DOWNLOAD AND SERVE THE ORDER. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE AND TIME OF PLACE OF TRIAL. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-01-2022 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S JOINDER IN DEFENDANT SF COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE AND ALL RELATED DISCOVERY DEADLINES. SEE UNDERLYING MOTION FOR APPEARANCES AND FURTHER DETAILS ON RULING. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
